  • API Reference

authselect_test_framework.utils.authselect

Selecting authselect profiles.

Classes

AuthselectUtils(*args, **kwargs)

Use authselect to configure nsswitch and PAM.
class authselect_test_framework.utils.authselect.AuthselectUtils(*args, **kwargs)

Bases: MultihostUtility[MultihostHost]

Use authselect to configure nsswitch and PAM.

Example usage
@pytest.mark.topology(Profile.SSSD)
@pytest.mark.topology(Profile.Winbind)
def test_example(client: Client, provider: GenericProvider):
    client.authselect.select('sssd', ['with-mkhomedir'])

Note

Authselect changes are restored in ClientHost.teardown().

Find all MultihostUtility objects in the constructor.

select(profile: str, features: List[str] = []) → None

Select an authselect profile.

Parameters:

  • profile (str) – Authselect profile name.

  • features (list[str], optional) – Authselect features to enable, defaults to []

assert_selected(profile: str, features: List[str] | None = None) → None

Verify that authselect profile and features were applied.

Parameters:

  • profile (str) – Authselect profile or preset name passed to select().

  • features (list[str] | None, optional) – Authselect features expected to be enabled, defaults to None

list() → ProcessResult

Run authselect list.

Returns:

Command result.

Return type:

ProcessResult

current(raw: bool = False) → str

Return current Authselect configuration.

Parameters:

raw (bool, optional) – If True, run authselect current --raw, defaults to False

Returns:

Authselect configuration

Return type:

str

disable_feature(features: List[str]) → None

Disable Authselect feature. :param features: Authselect features to disable :type: list[str], required

enable_feature(features: List[str]) → None

Enable Authselect feature. :param features: Authselect features to enable :type: list[str], required

is_feature_enabled(feature: str | List[str]) → bool

Check whether authselect features are enabled.

Runs authselect is-feature-enabled for each given feature. When multiple features are passed, returns True only if every feature is enabled.

Parameters:

feature (str | list[str]) – Feature name or list of feature names.

Returns:

True if the feature (or every feature in the list) is enabled.

Return type:

bool
